description: Small retrieval fixture for measuring rerank lift. Each query lists candidates in deterministic-blend order (best blend first) with a relevance flag and an embedding vector. In every query the truly relevant candidate sits below the top-k cut in blend order, but its vector is closest to the query vector, so rerank should raise hit-rate@k from 0 to 1 without ever demoting a relevant item. Reused by the memory-strategy eval (subject 04).

queries.query: refresh the auth token before it expires

candidates.snippet: rotate the refresh token shortly before expiry

queries.query: why did the concurrency test flake

candidates.snippet: prefer guard clauses over nested branches
update the readme when flags change
the parallel test shared a temp dir and raced
drain the review queue oldest first
align markdown table columns by widest cell
